name: Amulet of Betrayal
description: You can use a bonus action to move one of the following conditions from yourself to an ally within 60 feet of you: {@condition blinded}, {@condition deafened}, {@condition frightened}, {@condition poisoned}, {@condition stunned}, {@condition exhaustion}. When transferring {@condition exhaustion}, move all your {@condition exhaustion} levels. If the chosen ally is immune to a transferred condition, the transfer fails.
